chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1868 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) Priority 1. For hearing on Misc. No.8410/2024. 2. For hearing of main case. 24-03-2025 Mr. Naveed Ali, advocate holds brief for Mr. Adeel Awan, Advocate for the petitioner. Sardar Zafar Hussain, Advocate for Respondents No.1 & 3. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits under instructions that this petition may be disposed of, however, the fate of the security be subject to outcome of SCRA No.1576/2024. Learned counsel for the department has no cavil to the aforesaid. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
